case_title: DONALD HENSIC VS. RETIREMENT BOARD OF THE CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN
cause_of_action: WRITS OF MANDATE OR PROH., CERTI., ETC./ADMIN. AGEN

docket_entries.description: PETITION FOR WRIT OF MANDATE/ PROHIBITION/ CERTIFICATION FILED BY PETITIONER HENSIC, DONALD AS TO RESPONDENT RETIREMENT BOARD OF THE CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
ANSWER TO PETITION FOR WRIT OF MANDATE/ PROHIBITION/ CERTIFICATION FILED BY RESPONDENT RETIREMENT BOARD OF THE CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO

NOTICE OF MOTION AND MOTION FOR WRIT OF MANDAMUS PURSUANT TO CCP 1094.5, PROOF OF SERVICE, POINTS AND AUTHORITIES, DECLARATION FILED BY PETITIONER HENSIC, DONALD HEARING SET FOR DEC-20-2010 AT 09:30 AM IN DEPT 301
MEMORANDUM OF POINTS AND AUTHORITIES IN OPPOSITION TO PETITION FOR WRIT OF MANDATE FILED BY RESPONDENT RETIREMENT BOARD OF THE CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO

LAW AND MOTION 301, JUDGE BUSCH MADE A DISCLOSURE ABOUT HIS WIFE, CATHARINE BARNES, A DEPUTY CITY ATTORNEY NOT INVOLVED IN THIS CASE AND THAT HE DOES NOT VIEW HER EMPLOYMENT AS A BASIS FOR RECUSAL. NO OBJECTIONS WERE MADE. THE MATTER WAS ARGUED. PETITIONER DONALD HENSIC'S MOTION FOR WRIT OF MANDAMUS PURSUANT TO CCP 1094.5 IS DENIED. THE WEIGHT OF THE EVIDENCE SUPPORTS THE HEARING OFFICER'S FINDING THAT A LIGHT OR MODIFIED DUTY WAS AVAILABLE TO PLAINTIFF AT THE TIME OF HIS RETIREMENT. PREVAILING PARTY IS TO SUBMIT A PROPOSED FORM OF ORDER. JUDGE: PETER J. BUSCH, REPORTER: ARLENE HOWELL, CSR # 2542 =(301/PJB)
MINI-MINUTES FOR DEC-20-2010 9:30 AM FOR DEPT 301
ORDER DENYING WRIT OF ADMINISTRATIVE MANDAMUS

NO OBJECTIONS WERE MADE. THE MATTER WAS ARGUED. PETITIONER DONALD HENSIC'S Motion For Writ Of Mandamus Pursuant To Ccp 1094.5 IS DENIED.
